_comment: SYNTHESIZED fixture, not a real capture. Replace with a scrubbed real payload when available. Has a customer message (1) plus a part with an UNKNOWN renderable_type (999) that is NOT in the known/skipped sets. normalizeConversation must skip it (no parts/internal_notes entry) AND console.warn the code + conversation id.
title: Conversation with a novel message type

blocks.text: Some future Intercom message kind we don't map yet.
